{{Quote|<s></s>''Me,'' I think you'll do the right thing. But Gargachykk, he's not so convinced. He ''always'' expects the worst from people.|Asa Naga, threatening Feen Fenoob|<ref name="Darth Maul 2" />}}
'''Gargachykk''', or '''Garga''', was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] enforcer in the employ of the [[Dug/Legends|Dug]] [[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]] [[Vigo/Legends|Vigo]] [[Darnada]]. In [[33 BBY/Legends|33 BBY]], Gargachykk and fellow enforcer [[Asa Naga]] tried to collect a [[Gambling/Legends|gambling]] debt from the [[Sullustan/Legends|Sullustan]] [[Feen Fenoob]] aboard [[Deep Space Demolition and Removal|Darnada's space station]], but their prey evaded them. However, Fenoob was then [[Death/Legends|killed]] by a newcomer to the [[Space station/Legends|station]]—the [[Zabrak/Legends|Zabrak]] [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Sith Lord]] [[Darth Maul/Legends|Darth Maul]]. Maul, concealing his identity as a [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord]], revealed himself to Gargachyyk and Naga and asked to be taken to Darnada so he could join Black Sun. Once the two enforcers brought him before their boss, Maul slaughtered the Vigo, Gargachyyk, and all of Darnada's henchmen except for Naga.

==Biography==
{{Quote|I came to kill you. ''All'' of you.|Darth Maul, shortly before slaying Gargachykk|<ref name="Darth Maul 2" />}}
Gargachykk, or "Garga" for short, was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] who worked as an enforcer for the [[Dug/Legends|Dug]] [[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]] [[Vigo/Legends|Vigo]] [[Darnada]] in the [[Standard year/Legends|years]] leading up to the [[Invasion of Naboo/Legends|Battle of Naboo]] in [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]]. At some point in his life, he lost his left [[Eye/Legends|eye]] and wore an [[Eye patch/Legends|eye patch]] to cover the empty socket. In [[33 BBY/Legends|33 BBY]], Gargachykk and a fellow enforcer named [[Asa Naga]] were dispatched by Darnada to collect a [[Gambling/Legends|gambling]] debt from the [[Sullustan/Legends|Sullustan]] [[Feen Fenoob]] aboard [[Deep Space Demolition and Removal|Darnada's space station]]. Gargachykk and Naga waited for Fenoob inside the [[Space station/Legends|station's]] [[Hangar/Legends|hangar]] and confronted him when the Sullustan ran into the hangar in an attempt to hide there.<ref name="Darth Maul 2" />

[[File:Garga_dismembered.png|thumb|left|250px|Gargachykk decapitated by Maul]]
The enforcers captured Fenoob and prepared to take him to Darnada, but the Sullustan unexpectedly used [[Flash detonator/Legends|flash globes]] to temporarily blind them and escape from their grasp. Gargachykk and Naga continued their search for the debtor, but soon each of them separately found Fenoob's [[Death/Legends|dead]] body, [[Sai tok/Legends|severed at the waist]], near a [[Scimitar/Legends|parked ship]]. They then encountered a [[Sith tattoo|tattooed]] [[Zabrak/Legends|Zabrak]] close by, in possession of a partially-ignited, [[Color/Legends|red]]-bladed [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]]. Naga ordered the stranger not to move, but the Zabrak deactivated [[Darth Maul's double-bladed lightsaber/Legends|his weapon]] and told the enforcers that they should not fear him. He introduced himself as [[Darth Maul/Legends|Maul]], said that he had killed Fenoob, and asked to be taken to Darnada so that he could join Black Sun.<ref name="Darth Maul 2" />

Believing that Darnada could use someone like Maul, Naga agreed, and he and Gargachykk escorted the newcomer to Darnada's quarters. Naga presented Maul to Darnada, but the Dug was not impressed and asked Maul to reveal his true reason for coming to his station. Maul—who was actually a [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Sith Lord]] named [[Darth/Legends|Darth]] Maul on assignment for his [[Sith Master/Legends|Master]], [[Palpatine/Legends|Darth Sidious]]—replied that he had come to kill everyone present on the station and activated his [[Double-bladed lightsaber/Legends|double-bladed lightsaber]]. Gargachykk was the first to react and charged at the Zabrak with his [[Blaster rifle/Legends|blaster rifle]], but Maul [[Cho mok/Legends|cut off]] his right [[Limb/Legends|arm]] and [[Sai cha/Legends|beheaded]] him with one swift strike, killing the Wookiee. Maul then slaughtered Darnada and all his men save Naga, whom he spared in order to spread word of Darnada's death to other Black Sun leaders.<ref name="Darth Maul 2" />

==Personality and traits==
{{Quote|So what's it gonna be, Feen? We gonna be able to work this out? 'Cause the ''other'' option… I mean, you ''do'' know how fond Wookiees are of pulling arms out of sockets.|Asa Naga, threatening Feen Fenoob with Gargachykk|<ref name="Darth Maul 2" />}}
Gargachykk was a large and powerfully built Wookiee with black eyes and white [[Hair/Legends|hair]], which he styled in three long braids below his chin. According to Asa Naga, Gargachykk was not very trusting of people and always expected the worst from them. While threatening Feen Fenoob, Naga also hinted that Gargachykk would rip the Sullustan's arms out of their sockets if he did not comply. Gargachykk was loyal to Darnada and attacked Darth Maul as soon as the latter activated his lightsaber, but the Wookiee was quickly killed.<ref name="Darth Maul 2" />

==Behind the scenes==
Gargachykk first appeared in [[Darth Maul (2000) 2|''Darth Maul'' (2000) 2]], a [[Star Wars comic books|comic book]] written by [[Ron Marz]], illustrated by [[Jan Duursema]],<ref name="Darth Maul 2" /> and released on [[October 4]], [[2000]]<ref name="Marvel">{{Marvel|url=comics/issue/54104/star_wars_darth_maul_2000_2|text=Star Wars: Darth Maul (2000) #2}}</ref> as part of the [[Star Wars: Darth Maul (2000)|''Star Wars: Darth Maul'']] comic series.<ref name="Darth Maul 2" /> In the [[2001]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]'', Gargachykk's name appeared as a possible leader for AI players controlling the Wookiee faction in the standard game mode.<ref name="GB">''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]''</ref>
